evidence: "This low budget movie looks fabulous, the action is incredible."
"Nothing is worse than an unfunny comedy."
"This movie has nothing to offer, until the very end."
"After 10 minutes, it got so dumb that my brain started hurting and I had to stop."
"The movie is about to show something good, then it cuts away to something else."
"This film makes 'Judge Dredd' look like the tepid, cheesy mess that it is."
"Good screenplay about a British lawyer trying to free a man convicted of a decade-old murder."
"The visuals are stunning, clear, crisp and vibrant."
"Excellent animation, great voice acting and high-caliber screenplays make this series a real winner."
"This movie is future! Just think: Disney can churn out a dozen of these movies every 6 months."
"I wouldn't force prisoners in Gitmo to watch homage to bad screenplay writing; no one should volunteer to view Psych."

summary: The user has a strong preference for action and sci-fi genres but expresses significant dissatisfaction with poorly executed narratives and pacing. They value high production quality and visual spectacle, yet show little emotional engagement with the content.
